name: Maharishi Amrit Kalash (MAK)
indication: Comprehensive wellness formula for holistic health, vitality and longevity
dosage: Adults: 1 teaspoon Nectar (approx 10gm) twice daily + 1 Ambrosia tablet twice daily with milk. Kids: 1/2 teaspoon Nectar twice daily + 1 Ambrosia tablet twice daily

keyIngredients.name: Amla
keyIngredients.description: Rich in vitamin C, it nourishes dhatus, moistens tissues

keyIngredients.name: Haritaki
keyIngredients.description: Detoxifies ama (toxins) that aggravate Vata, improves digestion, and calms nerves for better sleep and mental clarity

keyIngredients.name: Cow Ghee
keyIngredients.description: Lubricates channels, soothes Vata's roughness, enhances absorption of fat-soluble herbs

keyIngredients.name: Ashwagandha
keyIngredients.description: Rejuvenates muscles/bones, reduces stress-induced Vata imbalance

keyIngredients.name: Shatavari
keyIngredients.description: Nourishes rakta/dhatus, moistens Vata dryness in mucous membranes/GI tract, and balances hormones to ease fatigue/anxiety

keyIngredients.name: Shankhapushpi
keyIngredients.description: Tranquilizes mind, reduces nervousness, and stabilizes Vata fluctuations in seniors

keyIngredients.name: Bilva
keyIngredients.description: Anti-inflammatory, warms body, and eases joint stiffness

keyIngredients.name: Safed Chandan
keyIngredients.description: Soothes nerve irritation, calms restlessness, and promotes mental clarity for age-related cognitive issues

keyIngredients.name: Punarnava
keyIngredients.description: Rejuvenates tissues, reduces Vata-induced edema/swelling and strengthens muscles

description: The world's most researched Rasayana - Maharishi Amrit Kalash is a consciousness-based Ayurvedic formulation developed by combining ancient Vedic wisdom with modern scientific understanding. Crafted with meticulous attention in a Satvik atmosphere under Vedic chants.
mechanism: Nectar brings balance of all Gunas, Agnis and Dhatus, thereby increasing Ojas. Ambrosia improves mind-body coordination and cell intelligence integrity, supporting the body's natural self-repair mechanisms.
vataBalancing: MAK balances Vata dosha in the elderly by nourishing tissues, calming nerves, lubricating joints through its 53 herbs, ghee, and honey base. Key ingredients target Vata-aggravated issues like joint pain, anxiety, dryness, and weakness common in aging. MAK's synergistic formula promotes ojas, counters Vata vridhi from age, and supports mobility/digestion—ideal for geriatric wellness.
benefits: Cardioprotective - reduces angina pain frequency by 33.3%
Antioxidant - 1000x more potent than Vitamin C, E and Probucol
Anti-ageing and cognitive support - decreases rate of age-related cognitive decline
Immunomodulator - reduces frequency of falling sick by 50%
Chemotoxicity support - reduces vomiting episodes in chemotherapy patients
Cancer prevention - supports body's natural defense mechanisms
Rejuvenation and vitality - restores inner balance
De-stressing - alleviates stress from modern lifestyles

faqs.question: What is Maharishi Amrit Kalash?
faqs.answer: Maharishi Amrit Kalash is a consciousness-based Ayurvedic formulation combining ancient Vedic wisdom with modern science, designed for holistic health, vitality, and longevity.

faqs.question: How does Amrit Kalash work?
faqs.answer: It balances Gunas, Agnis, and Dhatus to elevate Ojas, enhances mind-body coordination, and supports natural self-repair mechanisms through its potent herbal blend.

faqs.question: What are the key benefits of Amrit Kalash?
faqs.answer: It provides cardioprotective effects, antioxidant power 1000x stronger than vitamins C and E, anti-aging support, immunomodulation, and helps manage stress and chronic conditions.

faqs.question: Is Amrit Kalash safe for long-term use?
faqs.answer: Yes, it is clinically researched with 81 studies and is safe for long-term use under physician guidance, with no reported side effects when taken as directed.

faqs.question: How should Amrit Kalash be taken?
faqs.answer: Adults take 1 teaspoon Nectar (10gm) twice daily with 1 Ambrosia tablet twice daily with milk. Kids take half the dose. Consult a doctor for personalized advice.

name: Nidramap
indication: Potent Cannabis-Based Ayurvedic Solution for Sleep Disorders
dosage: 1-2 tablets before bed time with milk or lukewarm water
description: Nidramap is a clinically advanced Ayurvedic formulation crafted with a unique blend of 6 potent herbs, including the therapeutic benefits of cannabis. This holistic solution is designed to address multiple factors contributing to sleep disorders, such as insomnia, stress, and chronic pain. By combining the ancient principles of Ayurveda with modern scientific advancements, Nidramap ensures restorative sleep, mental relaxation, and overall well-being. Its proven safety and efficacy make it a trusted solution for improving sleep quality and managing associated conditions.
mechanism: Manages insomnia by addressing root causes, boosts melatonin production for faster sleep onset, calms nervous system by reducing cortisol, provides potent analgesic action for pain relief, and promotes holistic relaxation for deep restorative sleep.
benefits: Manages insomnia and enhances sleep quality
Boosts melatonin production for faster sleep onset
Calms the nervous system and reduces stress/anxiety
Potent analgesic action for chronic pain relief
Promotes holistic relaxation and mental fatigue reduction
Comprehensive sleep solution targeting multiple disruptors

clinicalHighlights.sleep_quality: Helps manage insomnia and improves the quality of sleep
clinicalHighlights.melatonin_boost: Boosts the production of melatonin (sleep-inducing hormone)
clinicalHighlights.sleep_duration: Promotes faster onset and longer duration of sleep
clinicalHighlights.stress_reduction: Calms the nervous system and lowers cortisol levels, reducing anxiety and stress
clinicalHighlights.pain_relief: Potent analgesic that reduces chronic pain effectively

faqs.question: What is Nidramap used for?
faqs.answer: Nidramap is designed to manage insomnia, enhance sleep quality, boost melatonin production, calm the nervous system, and provide analgesic relief for sleep disorders.

faqs.question: Is Nidramap safe to use?
faqs.answer: Yes, Nidramap is a clinically advanced Ayurvedic formulation with proven safety and efficacy, free from steroids, and suitable for long-term use under medical supervision.

faqs.question: How does Nidramap work?
faqs.answer: It addresses root causes of sleep disturbances, promotes natural melatonin synthesis, reduces cortisol levels, and offers potent analgesic action for better sleep.

faqs.question: Can Nidramap be taken with other medications?
faqs.answer: Consult a physician before combining with other medications, as it can be used as an adjuvant therapy during acute conditions.

faqs.question: What are the key ingredients in Nidramap?
faqs.answer: Key ingredients include Shodhit Bhang, Jatamansi, Tagar, Brahmi, Shankhapushpi, and Ashwagandha, providing therapeutic benefits for sleep and stress.

name: Amlant
indication: Clinically Proven Formulation for Acidity & GERD
description: Amlant offers a holistic and multi-dimensional approach to managing hyperacidity, acid-peptic disorders, and associated conditions. This Ayurvedic formulation provides immediate relief by neutralising gastric acid and addresses the root cause of acidity to ensure long-term healing and prevention of recurrence. Researched at AIIMS, New Delhi.
mechanism: Pacifies Vata, neutralises hyperactive Pitta, and promotes Kapha, restoring digestive balance. Its Ropan (healing) and Deepan (digestive stimulant) properties promote the healing of gastric and duodenal ulcers. Enhances digestion quality and acts as an effective adjuvant to steroidal and non-steroidal anti-inflammatory drugs.
benefits: Rapid and sustained relief from acidity
Targets the root cause of hyperacidity
Effective for heartburn and chronic acidity
Protects against drug-induced gastric damage
Complete relief in non-ulcer dyspepsia within 45 days
Over 50% of patients reported no recurrence after 3 months

clinicalHighlights.relief_rate: Higher number of patients got relief in Non-ulcer dyspepsia compared to Ranitidine (n=100, p=0.06)
clinicalHighlights.complete_relief: Complete relief in non-ulcer dyspepsia in 45 days
clinicalHighlights.no_recurrence: More than 50% of patients reported no recurrence of acidity in 3 months follow-up

researchPartners: All India Institute of Medical Sciences (AIIMS), New Delhi

faqs.question: What conditions does Amlant treat?
faqs.answer: Amlant is effective for hyperacidity, acid-peptic disorders, peptic ulcer syndrome, and can be used as an adjuvant therapy with NSAIDs.

faqs.question: How does Amlant provide relief?
faqs.answer: It neutralizes gastric acid for immediate relief, addresses root causes, pacifies Vata, neutralizes Pitta, and promotes Kapha for long-term healing.

faqs.question: Is Amlant researched?
faqs.answer: Yes, Amlant is clinically proven at AIIMS, New Delhi, with studies showing complete relief in non-ulcer dyspepsia within 45 days.

faqs.question: Can Amlant be taken long-term?
faqs.answer: Yes, it is safe for long-term use, providing sustained relief and preventing recurrence of acidity symptoms.

faqs.question: What are the key ingredients in Amlant?
faqs.answer: Key ingredients include Amla, Shunthi, Shatavari, Haritaki, Vibhitaki, Amalaki, and Pippali, which restore digestive balance.

name: Asthomap
indication: Clinically Proven for Prolonged Asthma Relief
description: Asthomap is an Ayurvedic formulation designed to provide long-term relief for respiratory conditions. Powered by a judicious combination of natural herbs, it offers outstanding efficacy without the side effects of steroids. Asthomap works effectively to allay bronchospasms, reduce mucus build-up, and improve airflow, ensuring sustained respiratory health. Prolonged use minimises allergen hypersensitivity, reduces dependence on other medications, and strengthens the mucosal lining for enhanced respiratory immunity.
mechanism: Allays bronchospasms, reduces mucus build-up, improves airflow, minimises allergen hypersensitivity, strengthens mucosal lining, and enhances respiratory immunity.
benefits: Outstanding efficacy: 90% of patients experienced significant relief from bronchial asthma within 30 days
Significant symptom relief: Reduces breathlessness, frequency of asthma attacks, and protects against allergic reactions
Immunity enhancer: Boosts the respiratory system's immunity, combating respiratory diseases effectively
Safe for long-term use: Free from steroids, ensuring safety over prolonged periods
Adjuvant therapy: Can be combined with Salbutamol and other antiasthmatic drugs during acute conditions

clinicalHighlights.efficacy: 90% of patients got relief from bronchial asthma within 30 days

faqs.answer: Asthomap provides long-term relief for bronchial asthma, chronic bronchitis, and bronchial respiratory allergies without steroid side effects.

faqs.answer: Clinical studies show 90% of patients experience significant relief from bronchial asthma within 30 days, reducing breathlessness and allergic reactions.

name: Cardimap
indication: For Sustained and Effective Hypertension Control

Combining renowned Medhya Rasayans and anti-hypertensive herbs supports neuromuscular relaxation, optimises blood flow, and strengthens the parasympathetic nervous system, ensuring overall mental and physical well-being.
mechanism: Regulates blood pressure, alleviates stress and anxiety, strengthens nervous system, enhances mental clarity, improves digestion, and provides cardiotonic benefits.

Stress and anxiety relief: Alleviates anxiety, neurosis, and stress while promoting restful sleep and calmness

name: Glucomap
indication: Clinically Proven for Effective Diabetes Management
description: Glucomap is a scientifically validated herbal formulation, researched at AIIMS, New Delhi, and KGMU, Lucknow, and crafted with the power of 25 potent herbs. This clinically proven formula ensures comprehensive glycemic control, effectively managing HbA1c, fasting, and postprandial glucose levels while improving overall metabolic health. It also alleviates diabetes-associated symptoms such as fatigue, constipation, and palpitations, offering a holistic approach to non-insulin-dependent diabetes mellitus (NIDDM).
mechanism: Stimulates pancreatic beta cells to enhance natural insulin secretion, reduces HbA1c and glucose levels, decreases triglycerides and cholesterol, processed in Salsaradi Gana.
benefits: Reduces HbA1c by ~17% in 3 months and ~26% in 6 months
Lowers fasting blood glucose from ~128.5 to ~106.8 mg/dL
Reduces postprandial blood glucose from ~235.5 to ~178.5 mg/dL
Decreases triglyceride levels by ~10% in 3 months
Reduces cholesterol levels by ~20% in 3 months
Stimulates pancreatic beta cells to enhance natural insulin secretion

clinicalHighlights.hbA1c_reduction: HbA1c reduces by 17% in 3 months and by 26% in 6 months
clinicalHighlights.fasting_glucose: Average fasting blood glucose from 128.5 to 106.8 mg/dL
clinicalHighlights.triglycerides: Triglyceride level by 10% and Cholesterol level by 20% in 3 months
clinicalHighlights.symptoms_relief: Relieves other symptoms of diabetes like polyuria, fatigue, constipation, palpitation etc.

researchPartners: All India Institute of Medical Sciences (AIIMS), New Delhi
certifications: Clinically proven at AIIMS and KGMU

faqs.question: What is Glucomap used for?
faqs.answer: Glucomap manages non-insulin-dependent diabetes mellitus (NIDDM), prediabetes, and can be used as an adjuvant with oral hypoglycemic agents (OHA).

faqs.question: How effective is Glucomap in controlling blood sugar?
faqs.answer: It reduces HbA1c by 17% in 3 months and 26% in 6 months, lowers fasting glucose from 128.5 to 106.8 mg/dL, and postprandial from 235.5 to 178.5 mg/dL.

faqs.question: Is Glucomap researched?
faqs.answer: Yes, researched at AIIMS, New Delhi, and KGMU, Lucknow, with clinical studies validating its efficacy in glycemic control and metabolic health.

faqs.question: What are the additional benefits of Glucomap?
faqs.answer: It decreases triglycerides by 10% and cholesterol by 20%, stimulates insulin secretion, and alleviates diabetes symptoms like fatigue and constipation.

faqs.question: How should Glucomap be taken?
faqs.answer: Take 2 tablets twice daily with lukewarm water. Consult a physician for monitoring blood sugar levels and personalized advice.

name: Lipomap
indication: Clinically Proven Remedy to Balance Lipid Profile
dosage: 2 Tablets B.I.D, half an hour before meals, with lukewarm water
description: Lipomap is a clinically proven Ayurvedic formulation meticulously researched at AIIMS, New Delhi. It is crafted from a powerful combination of 17 herbs, including Gugulu, Kanchnaar, Amalaki, cinnamon, ginger, black pepper, and pippali. It effectively manages hypercholesterolaemia by balancing Kapha, regulating fat metabolism, and improving lipid metabolism. Lipomap provides a safe, effective, and side-effect-free alternative to statins, addressing the root causes of cholesterol imbalance while promoting long-term cardiovascular health.
mechanism: Balances Kapha and bile secretion, regulates fat metabolism with Medohar herbs, improves circulation and metabolism.
benefits: Balances cholesterol levels: Significant reduction in triglycerides (~13% in 3 months) and total cholesterol (~239 mg/dL to ~229 mg/dL), outperforming Lovastatin
Regulates fat metabolism: Medohar herbs reduce fat deposition and improve lipid metabolism naturally
Boosts good cholesterol (HDL): Higher increase in HDL levels compared to Lovastatin after 3 months
Lowers LDL levels: Reduces LDL cholesterol from ~161.9 mg/dL to ~155.2 mg/dL
Balances bile secretion: Maintains proper digestion and prevents cholesterol accumulation
Supports cardiovascular health: Improves circulation and metabolism for long-term heart health

clinicalHighlights.triglycerides: Significant reduction in triglyceride level by 13% in 3 months as compared to Lovastatin (8%)
clinicalHighlights.cholesterol: Total cholesterol level from 239 to 229 mg/dL
clinicalHighlights.hdl: HDL level more in the Lipomap group as compared to the Lovastatin group in 3 months

researchPartners: All India Institute of Medical Sciences (AIIMS), New Delhi
certifications: Better than Lovastatin in lipid profile improvement

faqs.question: What conditions does Lipomap treat?
faqs.answer: Lipomap manages hypercholesterolaemia, hyperlipidemia, and coronary artery disease by balancing cholesterol and improving lipid profiles.

faqs.question: How does Lipomap compare to statins?
faqs.answer: Lipomap outperforms Lovastatin in reducing triglycerides (13% vs 8%), total cholesterol, and increasing HDL levels, with no side effects.

faqs.question: Is Lipomap safe for long-term use?
faqs.answer: Yes, it is a safe, side-effect-free alternative to statins, researched at AIIMS, and promotes long-term cardiovascular health.

faqs.question: What are the key benefits of Lipomap?
faqs.answer: It regulates fat metabolism, boosts good cholesterol (HDL), lowers LDL, balances bile secretion, and supports digestion and circulation.

faqs.question: How should Lipomap be taken?
faqs.answer: Take 2 tablets twice daily, half an hour before meals, with lukewarm water. Consult a doctor for monitoring lipid levels.

name: Livomap
indication: Clinically Proven Solution for Fatty Liver
dosage: Tablets: 1-2 tablets B.I.D; Syrup: 1-2 teaspoons 10ml B.I.D
form: Tablets: Blister packs of 10s; Syrup: Bottles of 100 ml and 200 ml

It is formulated with a powerful combination of 28 herbs, including Phyllanthus niruri and Picrorhiza kurroa. It is designed to protect, detoxify, and rejuvenate the liver by addressing the root causes of fatty liver, inflammation, infections, and chronic liver disorders. Livomap improves liver function, stimulates liver regeneration, enhances bile flow, and detoxifies the liver and blood-forming organs. Its multi-dimensional approach ensures long-term liver health and comprehensive care.
mechanism: Stimulates protein and nucleic acid synthesis for liver regeneration, detoxifies liver and blood-forming organs, enhances bile flow and digestion, expels intestinal parasites.

Provides complete relief from abdominal pain: 95% of patients get complete relief (p<0.01)
Promotes liver regeneration: Stimulates protein and nucleic acid synthesis, reversing cirrhotic changes
Supports detoxification and toning: Detoxifies liver, spleen, and blood-forming organs while expelling parasites
Enhances bile flow and digestion: Improves bile flow, prevents gallstone formation, enhances digestive efficiency

name: Kasni
indication: NON-DROWSY FORMULATION FOR ACUTE & CHRONIC COUGH
dosage: Adults: 2 Teaspoons 10ml B.I.D, Kids: 1 Teaspoon 5ml B.I.D
description: Kasni is a clinically trusted Ayurvedic remedy formulated with a unique blend of 16 powerful herbs, including Tulsi (Ocimum sanctum), Ginger (Zingiber officinale), Pistacia integerrima, and Myrica nagi. These herbs contribute to its potent antitussive, antiallergic, and expectorant properties, effectively relieving acute and chronic coughs across diverse aetiologies. With its non-sedative and alcohol-free formulation, Kasni ensures relief without causing drowsiness or dependency, allowing patients of all ages to remain active and alert throughout the day.
mechanism: Balances Vata & Kapha, non-sedating & alcohol-free, non-habit forming & non-constipating, relieves sore throat, tones respiratory system.
vataBalancing: Balances Vata & Kapha for efficient mucus elimination.
benefits: Balances vata & kapha: Restores respiratory harmony by pacifying aggravated Vata and liquefying vitiated Kapha for efficient mucus elimination.
Non-sedating & alcohol-free: Suitable for all age groups, enabling clear breathing and comfort without compromising alertness.
Non-habit forming & non-constipating: Ensures long-term safety without dependency or digestive discomfort.
Relieves sore throat: Tulsi's antiallergic properties soothe irritation, tone the respiratory system, and support immunity.
Decongested nasal and bronchial passages: Promotes expectoration of tenacious mucus with Ginger's mucolytic and anti-inflammatory effects.
Strengthens lung function: Myrica nagi and Pistacia integerrima alleviate cough and enhance respiratory health.

clinicalHighlights.indications: Wet cough, Dry cough, Cough due to pollution, Smoker's cough

faqs.answer: Kasni is used for acute and chronic coughs, including wet cough, dry cough, cough due to pollution, and smoker's cough.

faqs.answer: It balances Vata and Kapha, provides antitussive, antiallergic, and expectorant properties through its herbal blend.

faqs.answer: Key ingredients include Tulsi, Ginger, Pistacia integerrima, Myrica nagi, and other herbs that support respiratory health.

name: Leucomap
description: Leucomap is a time-tested herbal formulation made from a synergistic blend of 24 Ayurvedic herbs designed to address non-specific leucorrhoea and its associated symptoms. This natural remedy effectively regulates abnormal secretions, reduces cervical congestion, and enhances the overall health of the female genitourinary system. By improving the health of the ovaries, fallopian tubes, uterus, and cervix, Leucomap ensures comprehensive reproductive care. It also supports hormonal balance by addressing psychological factors influencing ovarian function and reproductive health.
mechanism: Safe and non-hormonal preparation, decreases abnormal white discharge, balances apana vayu, relieves cervical congestion, strengthens genitourinary system, promotes healthy hormonal interplay.
benefits: Safe and non-hormonal preparation: An entirely herbal formulation that works without interfering with hormones, ensuring long-term safety.
Decreases abnormal white discharge: Effectively controls excessive and abnormal cervical and endocervical secretions for optimal vaginal health.
Balances apana vayu: Regulates the downward energy flow, addressing the root cause of leucorrhoea and promoting overall balance in the reproductive system.

Promotes healthy hormonal interplay: Regulates ovarian function and balances hormones, ensuring a healthy reproductive environment.

name: Raktda
indication: Clinically Proven Ayurvedic Solution for Anaemia
description: Raktda is a scientifically validated Ayurvedic haematinic designed to effectively manage iron deficiency anaemia and its associated symptoms. Enriched with the goodness of iron, calcium, minerals, and vitamin C, Raktda supports haemopoiesis, enhances haemoglobin levels, and combats debility by improving protein anabolism. It restores energy, reduces fatigue, and improves overall vitality in anaemic and debilitated patients. Additionally, it stimulates blood formation by activating organs responsible for haemopoiesis and blood purification.
mechanism: Supports haemopoiesis, enhances haemoglobin levels, combats debility, stimulates blood formation.
benefits: Haemoglobin levels: An increase from 9.23 to 11.04 points within 30 days.
Reduces fatigue: Nearly 90% of patients reported less tiredness.
Improves appetite: Approximately 95% experienced enhanced appetite.
Holistic symptom relief: Over 80% of patients saw improvements in symptoms like paleness of skin, leg pain, narcolepsy, swelling.
Non-irritating formula: Provides iron in a highly bioavailable, reduced form that is gentle on the gastrointestinal tract.
Natural haemopoietic factors: Delivers essential trace elements and haemopoietic components derived from natural sources.

clinicalHighlights.symptom_relief: Over 80% saw improvements in paleness, leg pain, narcolepsy, swelling

faqs.answer: It increases haemoglobin from 9.23 to 11.04 in 30 days, reduces fatigue in 90% of patients, and improves appetite in 95%.

name: Restone
dosage: Syrup: 2 teaspoons daily, Tablets: 2 tablets daily
form: Syrup: 200 ml bottle, Tablets: 500 mg blister strips in packs of 10x10
description: Restone is a scientifically crafted Ayurvedic formulation tailored to support women's unique psychological and physiological needs. Enriched with Rasayanas and Medhya Rasayanas, it works holistically to restore balance and harmony. Restone supports mental functions, enhances adaptability to stress, and promotes emotional well-being while ensuring optimal reproductive and overall health. Stimulating and regulating vital systems, particularly the reproductive system, maintains homeostasis and prevents imbalances that may lead to menstrual disorders.
mechanism: Strengthens uterus function, balances hormone levels, restores menstrual health, adaptogenic & anti-stress, rejuvenates & revitalises, holistic regulation.
benefits: Strengthens uterus function: Supports the uterus (Kshetra) by improving its strength and alleviating pain and inflammation.
Balances hormone levels: Regulates the hypothalamus-pituitary-ovarian axis to harmonise the hormonal orchestra of female physiology.
Restores menstrual health: Maintaining a regular and healthy menstrual cycle alleviates discomfort associated with irregular periods.
Adaptogenic & anti-stress: Contains Medhya Rasayanas (nervine tonics) that improve mental functions, promote emotional stability, and prevent anxiety, irritability, and depression.
Rejuvenates & revitalises: Acts as a restorative tonic, improving vitality, general well-being, and adaptability to stress.
Holistic regulation: Stimulates and regulates vital systems, particularly the reproductive system, to maintain homeostasis and ensure overall health.

clinicalHighlights.effectiveness: Scientifically crafted for menstrual disorders and women's health
clinicalHighlights.safety: Enriched with Rasayanas and Medhya Rasayanas

faqs.question: What is Restone used for?
faqs.answer: Restone is used for premenstrual syndrome (PMS), dysfunctional uterine bleeding, polycystic ovarian syndrome (PCOS), menorrhagia, and dysmenorrhea.

faqs.question: How does Restone work?
faqs.answer: It strengthens uterus function, balances hormone levels, restores menstrual health, and provides adaptogenic and anti-stress benefits.

faqs.question: Is Restone safe?
faqs.answer: Yes, it is a scientifically crafted Ayurvedic formulation enriched with Rasayanas and Medhya Rasayanas.

faqs.question: What forms is Restone available in?
faqs.answer: Available as syrup (2 teaspoons daily) and tablets (2 tablets daily).

faqs.answer: Key ingredients include Ashok, Lodhra, Shatavari, and other herbs that support women's health.
